summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chrono DMI v2 - Medical Device Inventory Management System. Backend: 40/40 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All admin and light client flows working correctly. Fixed MongoDB index issue for order creation and light client redirect issue.
passed_tests: Health check /api/health returns status ok and version 2.0.0
Admin login (email/password) via / page - benoit.girard@atmshealth.com / Salut123
PIN login via /api/auth/login-pin with PIN 1234
Invalid password rejected with 401
Invalid PIN rejected with 401
GET /api/auth/me returns current user
CRUD Suppliers - create, get, update, delete
CRUD Product Categories - create, get, update
CRUD Product Types - create, get
CRUD Cabinets - create with N×M grid auto-generation, get, get locations
CRUD Products - create with supplier/category/type associations, get with enrichment
Order workflow - create order with items (creates ProductInstances with ORDERED status)
Order workflow - send order (sets order_date, locks order)
Order workflow - get order detail with items
Order workflow - receive items (assigns serial/lot/expiry, status→RECEIVED)
CRUD Interventions - create with products, get with filters (today/week/all)
CRUD Employees - get, get roles, create, update, delete
Movements audit log - get all movements
Product Instances - get all, get pending placement
Hardware stubs - unlock cabinet, emergency unlock (MOCKED)
Admin sidebar navigation - Interventions, Cabinets, Produits, Commandes, Employés, Mouvements
Admin modals - Create intervention, Create cabinet, Create order, Create employee
Products page tabs - Produits, Fournisseurs, Catégories, Types
Admin logout
Light client PIN login via /light/login with numpad
Light client interventions page displays today's interventions
Light client shows Réapprovisionnement and Remise en stock buttons for admin users
Light client logout
critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB index on serial_number was causing duplicate key errors for null values - FIXED by recreating index with partialFilterExpression
Light client /light/login route was missing redirect when user already logged in - FIXED in App.js
seed_data_creation: Test data created during pytest runs with TEST_ prefix. Interventions created for today visible in light client.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chrono DMI v2 is fully functional. Two client interfaces: Admin (/) and Light (/light/login). Admin requires email/password, Light uses PIN numpad. MongoDB index on product_instances.serial_number was recreated with partialFilterExpression to allow multiple null values. All CRUD operations work. Order workflow: create (draft) → send → receive. Hardware endpoints are MOCKED stubs.

fixes_applied.issue: MongoDB DuplicateKeyError on product_instances.serial_number when creating orders
fixes_applied.root_cause: Unique index on serial_number was rejecting multiple documents with null serial_number
fixes_applied.fix: Recreated index with partialFilterExpression: { serial_number: { $type: 'string' } } to only enforce uniqueness on non-null string values
fixes_applied.command: db.product_instances.dropIndex('serial_number_1'); db.product_instances.createIndex({ serial_number: 1 }, { unique: true, partialFilterExpression: { serial_number: { $type: 'string' } } })

fixes_applied.issue: Light client PIN login not redirecting to /light/interventions after successful login
fixes_applied.root_cause: /light/login route was not checking if user was already logged in
fixes_applied.fix: Added conditional redirect in App.js: user ? <Navigate to='/light/interventions' /> : <LightLogin onLogin={handleLogin} />
